title: Garrett R Baber
text:
Doctoral Candidate in Clinical Psychological Science
University of Kansas


I am a doctoral candidate in Clinical Psychological Science at the University of Kansas, heading to VA Palo Alto for my residency.
My research focuses on:

Dreaming
Sleep and insomnia
Nightmares
PTSD
Emotion regulation
Artificial intelligence and large language models

I am particularly interested in how dream experiences relate to waking emotional functioning and mental health.
Download CV

title: Research
text:
My research investigates how sleep and dreaming relate to emotional functioning and psychological health.


My dissertation examines whether emotional experiences in dreams contribute to next-day emotional functioning and PTSD symptoms.



I use machine learning and large language models to quantify dream content and emotional experiences.



I collaborate on projects investigating insomnia treatment, sleep health, and polysomnographic predictors of treatment outcomes.
